title: habenaria ruizii
intro: Habenaria ruizii, also known as Ruiz's orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Habenaria ruizii include the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems. The herbal preparation of Habenaria ruizii typically involves boiling the roots in water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
